mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (user_id, user_name, user_avatar, content, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{userAvatar}, #{content}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, user_name AS userName, user_avatar AS userAvatar, content, created_at AS createdAt FROM chat_message ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
